_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national (autopilot)
_meta.note: Evidence-finalize 5 TX state legislators (SD-6/8, HD-6/7, SD-7). Cited; null where no evidence; FALSE only where documented contrary.

carol-alvarado@TX.notes_append: Evidence-finalized 2026-06: long-serving progressive Democrat (Senate Dem Caucus chair). Pro-choice (authored access-expanding SB122/123/227; reported PP Houston board; PP Texas Votes endorsement). 15-hr filibuster vs SB1 voter-ID/mail restrictions (2021). Voted No on SB1362 Anti-Red-Flag (2025); caucus push for red-flag/background checks. Texas Values Action 5%. Not up until 2028.

0.note: Pro-choice; authored bills creating abortion-ban exceptions/repealing pre-Roe law; does not affirm personhood.

1.note: Voted No on SB8/SB4/HB1280; authored access-expanding bills.

2.note: No public position on embryo/stem-cell located.

3.note: No public position on euthanasia located.

4.note: Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Texas Votes (2024); reported PP Houston/SE-TX board member.

daniel-alders@TX.notes_append: Evidence-finalized 2026-06: freshman R (HD-6 Tyler/Smith Co., took office Jan 2025); YCT 90, Texas Alliance for Life 93%. Dense coauthor record on life, biological-sex, school choice, obscenity age-verification, election integrity, 2A, federalism, border. Scores from authored/coauthored bills (formal recorded position-taking) + campaign Issues page. Incumbent on 2026 ballot.

0.note: Coauthored HB2197 (unborn child rights) and HCR109 (Capitol Life Monument).

1.note: Coauthored HB1806 (no govt support to abortion providers), HB5510, HB4595; TAL 93%. (TX near-total ban.)

2.note: HB3132 is IVF reporting only, not an embryo-discard ban; no abolition position.

3.note: Palliative-care bills but no direct euthanasia/assisted-suicide vote.

4.note: Conservative PAC funding (TLR, Grassroots America, TREPAC); no abortion-industry money found.

jay-dean@TX.notes_append: Evidence-finalized 2026-06: multi-term R (HD-7 Longview, E. TX), former Longview mayor. Conservative on life (TAL 100%, voted SB8 heartbeat), marriage/gender (SB12; voted NO on HB1738 repeal of homosexual-conduct law), school choice (SB2 2025), sound money (HB1056), state sovereignty (HB796), 2A (HB1927 permitless carry, NRA 'A'). DOCUMENTED FISCAL OUTLIER: career 'F' from Texans for Fiscal Responsibility (votes for large spending). Won 2026 GOP primary; running general.

paul-bettencourt@TX.notes_append: Evidence-finalized 2026-06: senior R (SD-7 Houston/Harris Co.), Local Gov & Higher-Ed chair, property-tax-cut champion. Primary co-author SB8 heartbeat (TAL 100%); primary author SB10 Ten Commandments + co-author SB11 school prayer; YES SB2 ESA; YES HB1927 constitutional carry; YES SB1362 anti-red-flag; YES SB7 election integrity. Establishment-leadership profile (Freedom Index ~71% lifetime). Sitting; term to 2029, not up 2026. TX Senate hides per-member roll calls — scored via Freedom Index named votes + authorship.

angela-paxton@TX.notes_append: Evidence-finalized 2026-06: R (SD-8 Collin Co./N. Dallas), Religious-Liberty cmte vice-chair. TAL 100%; authored SB466/SB205 (fetal-development), SB13/SB204 (parental rights/library), SB2421/SB3003/SB2399 (obscenity age-verification), SB2906 (anti-debanking/anti-ESG), victim-protection bills; coauthored/voted SB2 ESA. DEVIATION FLAG: authored SCR28 (89R) urging a constitutional amendment to regulate/limit campaign spending — the less-conservative (anti-Citizens-United) side; left unscored (no clean rubric cell) but documented here. Sitting; term to 2029, NOT up 2026 (re-elected 2024). July-2025 divorce filing is personal, no seat change. TX Senate hides per-member roll calls — scored via authorship + scorecards.
